title: The Nervous Wreck
writer: E.J. Rath, F. McGrew Willis, Owen Davis
actors: Harrison Ford, Phyllis Haver, Chester Conklin
plot: Henry Williams, out in Arizona looking for a cure for his imaginary ills, stops at the ranch of Jud Morgan, and decides to stay. Jud's daughter, Sally, attracts his attention, although she is engaged to be married to Sheriff Bob W...
